message:
feat(fsci-conformance): add P2C-007 Array API E2E scenario fixtures and fix scenario discovery path

This commit does three related things that together enable the P2C-007
(Array API) conformance packet to be exercised end-to-end in CI:

## 1. Checked-in P2C-007 scenario fixtures

Eight JSON scenario files are added under
  crates/fsci-conformance/fixtures/artifacts/P2C-007/e2e/scenarios/

They cover the full Array API conformance surface:
  01 — happy-path creation + broadcast
  02 — shape mismatch recovery
  03 — indexing bounds and mask guard
  04 — dtype promotion matrix
  05 — zero-dim and scalar edge cases
  06 — malformed metadata defense
  07 — mixed dtype conflict recovery
  08 — mode switch and adversarial guardrails

The anchor (behavior_ledger.json), contracts (contract_table.json),
and threats (threat_matrix.json) metadata files are also included so
the E2E orchestrator can verify artifact completeness.

Previously all artifacts were git-ignored; the .gitignore is updated
to use a whitelist pattern that tracks only the P2C-007 e2e/scenarios
JSON files while continuing to ignore generated run output and the
anchor/contracts/threats dirs (which are large and change per-run for
other packets).

## 2. Scenario discovery path fix (e2e.rs)

The discover_scenarios() function previously looked for JSON files
directly inside `<packet>/e2e/`, but the actual structure nests them
one level deeper at `<packet>/e2e/scenarios/`. The lookup is corrected
to `packet_dir.join("e2e").join("scenarios")`, matching the on-disk
layout and the README documentation.

The fixtures/README.md glob pattern is also updated from the overly
specific `FSCI-P2C-*` to `*` so it matches all packet ID formats
(P2C-007 does not carry the FSCI- prefix).

## 3. New integration test: e2e_orchestrator_runs_arrayapi_packet_with_minimum_scenarios

A comprehensive integration test is added that:
  - Copies the checked-in P2C-007 fixtures into a temp directory
  - Invokes the e2e_orchestrator binary with --packet P2C-007
  - Asserts all 8 scenarios produce passing summary.json bundles
  - Validates forensic event logs contain expected fields (scenario_id,
    step_name, environment.seed, environment.input_hashes)

A helper function `copy_file` is introduced for cross-platform file
copying in test setup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -38,4 +38,13 @@ target-codex*/
 target_*/
 
 # Conformance test output artifacts (generated per-run)
-crates/fsci-conformance/fixtures/artifacts/
+crates/fsci-conformance/fixtures/artifacts/*
+!crates/fsci-conformance/fixtures/artifacts/P2C-007/
+crates/fsci-conformance/fixtures/artifacts/P2C-007/*
+!crates/fsci-conformance/fixtures/artifacts/P2C-007/e2e/
+crates/fsci-conformance/fixtures/artifacts/P2C-007/e2e/*
+!crates/fsci-conformance/fixtures/artifacts/P2C-007/e2e/scenarios/
+!crates/fsci-conformance/fixtures/artifacts/P2C-007/e2e/scenarios/*.json
+crates/fsci-conformance/fixtures/artifacts/P2C-007/anchor/
+crates/fsci-conformance/fixtures/artifacts/P2C-007/contracts/
+crates/fsci-conformance/fixtures/artifacts/P2C-007/threats/

@@ -34,7 +34,7 @@ Optional oracle artifacts:
 
 Packet-aware E2E scenarios are discovered from:
 
-- `artifacts/FSCI-P2C-*/e2e/scenarios/*.json`
+- `artifacts/*/e2e/scenarios/*.json`
 
 Each run writes forensic logs to:
